Completed: Project type is a Vite vanilla JavaScript website with Leaflet pop-ups and pan/zoom controls for a Middle-earth-themed map.

Completed: Vite project scaffolded in the current directory using the vanilla template and npm dependencies installed.

- [x] Launch the Project
Completed: User confirmed launch setup; added VS Code debug configuration in .vscode/launch.json.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
